title: CommandCenterUI: operator approval center for gated actions
description: Operator request hcom #17290: provide an easy way in CommandCenterUI to approve or reject actions the system needs approval for, such as running a command or accessing a file. Build this as an operator approval/attention center, not blanket auto-approval. It should surface MAP pending approval gates and visible agent terminal prompts where possible; provide inspect/open-terminal and explicit approve/reject/send-input actions; record/audit any terminal injection; and keep dangerous or broad approvals manual. Do not bypass Codex/Claude security prompts or introduce hidden/headless approval behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Approval center surfaces pending MAP approval gates and attention-worthy visible terminal prompts with source agent/context
Operator can approve/reject MAP gates through explicit UI actions that call existing runner/task mechanisms safely, with clear audit trail
For tool prompts inside agent terminals, UI only sends explicit operator input to visible sessions and records inject audit; it must not auto-approve or hide prompts
Security review verifies same-origin/localhost boundaries, target validation, and no new broad command execution surface
